cross_disciplinary_pairing.description: An offline agricultural expert tool designed to teach young agronomy students and smallholder farmers sustainable crop protection protocols and localized multilingual ledger bookkeeping without internet.

test_prompts.prompt: What is the recommended fertilizer schedule for maize, and which specific types should I apply at each stage?
Kwatanta alamomin cutar taba ganyen masara (CMD) kuma wane mataki ya kamata a dauka idan ta fito?
